questions.question: Why are manufacturing industries considered important for economic development?

options.B: They create employment and increase trade
options.D: They eliminate the need for agriculture

questions.explanation: Manufacturing industries create jobs, expand trade and increase national income.

questions.question: Which of the following best explains why industrial development reduces regional disparities?

options.A: Industries only develop in urban areas
options.B: Industries provide employment in backward areas

questions.explanation: Establishing industries in backward regions generates employment and development.

questions.question: Which classification of industries depends on the type of raw materials used?
questions.explanation: Industries can be classified as agro-based or mineral-based depending on raw materials.

questions.question: Which factor contributed most to the concentration of jute industries along the Hugli River?

options.B: Availability of raw jute and transport facilities

questions.explanation: Jute industries developed along the Hugli River due to raw materials, labour and transport.

questions.question: Which of the following factors is NOT responsible for the location of cotton textile industries?
questions.explanation: Tourism is not related to the location of cotton textile industries.

questions.question: Why is the iron and steel industry called the backbone of industrial development?

options.B: Other industries depend on steel for machinery

questions.explanation: Many industries depend on steel for tools, machinery and construction.

questions.question: What is the approximate ratio of raw materials used in steel production?
questions.explanation: Iron ore, coking coal and limestone are required roughly in the ratio of 4 : 2 : 1.

questions.question: Which region in India is known for its concentration of iron and steel industries due to raw material availability?
questions.explanation: The Chhotanagpur Plateau has abundant iron ore, coal and limestone.

questions.question: Which property of aluminium makes it suitable for aircraft manufacturing?
questions.explanation: Aluminium is light and resistant to corrosion, making it ideal for aircraft.

questions.question: Why are aluminium smelting plants usually located near sources of electricity?

options.B: Aluminium production requires high electricity consumption

questions.explanation: Aluminium smelting requires large amounts of electrical energy.

questions.question: Which chemical product is mainly used in the manufacture of fertilizers?
questions.explanation: Sulphuric acid is widely used in fertilizer production.

questions.question: Which factor explains why potash fertilizers are imported in India?

options.B: Lack of commercially usable potash reserves

questions.explanation: India does not have significant reserves of potash.

questions.question: Which of the following industries expanded rapidly after the Green Revolution?
questions.explanation: Fertilizer demand increased significantly after the Green Revolution.

questions.question: Why are cement factories located near limestone deposits?

options.B: Because limestone is the main raw material

questions.explanation: Limestone is the primary raw material for cement production.

questions.question: Which factor stimulated the growth of the automobile industry after economic liberalisation?
questions.explanation: New models and increased demand boosted the automobile industry.

questions.question: Which factor has contributed most to the growth of IT industries in India?
questions.explanation: Growth of hardware and software industries has driven IT development.

questions.question: Which pollutant released by industries is mainly responsible for air pollution?
questions.explanation: Sulphur dioxide is a major air pollutant released by industries.

questions.question: Which industries are major contributors to water pollution?
questions.explanation: Textile and chemical industries release dyes and chemicals into water bodies.

questions.question: Which environmental problem occurs when heated water from factories enters rivers?
questions.explanation: Discharging hot water causes thermal pollution affecting aquatic life.

questions.question: Which measure can reduce industrial air pollution?
questions.explanation: Electrostatic precipitators help remove particulate matter from emissions.

questions.question: Why is recycling wastewater important in industries?
questions.explanation: Recycling wastewater reduces freshwater contamination.

questions.question: Which method reduces noise pollution in industries?
questions.explanation: Silencers reduce noise generated by machines and generators.

questions.question: Which organisation has implemented environmental management systems for power plants in India?
questions.explanation: NTPC has ISO certification for environmental management.

questions.question: Which concept integrates economic development with environmental protection?
questions.explanation: Sustainable development balances economic growth and environmental protection.

questions.question: Which step helps industries achieve sustainable development?
questions.explanation: Energy-efficient technology helps reduce pollution and resource consumption.
